title: Here's Why NetApp (NTAP) is a Strong Value Stock

title: NetApp: Unlocking $7/Share Of Earnings Power By 2025
text: NetApp's public cloud transition is gaining momentum.

title: NetApp (NTAP) Set to Acquire Instaclustr, Terms Undisclosed
text: NetApp (NTAP) states that Instaclustr will be a part of the Spot by NetApp portfolio of solutions, post the acquisition

title: NetApp acquires Instaclustr to deliver open source databases as a service
text: Companies producing software are becoming ever more reliant on open source databases to build their programs, but it's complex working with all these different products. Instaclustr, a California startup, wanted to change that by offering popular open source databases delivered as a service.

title: NetApp Announces Intent to Acquire Instaclustr, the Industry Leading Platform for Deploying and Managing Open-Source Data and Workflow Applications as a Service
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NetApp announces intent to acquire Instaclustr, a leading platform provider of fully managed open-source database, pipeline & workflow applications.

title: Ex-Dividend Reminder: Oracle, Verizon Communications And NetApp
text: On 4/7/22, Oracle, Verizon Communications, and NetApp, will all trade ex-dividend for their respective upcoming dividends.

title: Here's Why NetApp Stock Has Underperformed The Market Since 2018
text: NetApp stock price rose 39% from around $60 at 2018 end, to $83 currently, due to favorable changes in its P/S multiple. This comes as a surprise, since the company has witnessed a drop in revenue over this period.
